title: Cyber Security & VAPT
content: Security is built into our DNA. We implement defense-grade architectures and zero-trust protocols.
details:
**Overview**: We don't just build websites; we fortify them. Our security experts conduct rigorous testing against OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities.

**Features**: Penetration logging, secure HTTP headers, JWT-based zero-trust backend authorization, and regular vulnerability scanning.

**Process**: Automated scanning followed by deep manual penetration testing by our ethical hackers.
